text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Air Groove and I are called to the
student council office.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What is it, President? I came in my signature
racewear, as requested.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for the abrupt summons. I have a
request for you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We're doing a report on signature racewear in the
next student newspaper. As such, I was wondering
if you could join me as a model.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You want me to model? But... why me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why, you ask? Your signature racewear is highly
rated among the students.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's beautiful, elegant, and tough—everything a
racer could ask for.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As such, I thought you would be perfect to show
the other students what it means to wear
signature racewear—and inspire them to want to
emulate you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's very high praise... Thank you. Very well. I'll
give this challenge everything I have, as always.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm glad to hear it. Then why don't we get
sta—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hold it right there!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Teio... Were you hiding in the student council
office again?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I should be the one standing next to Prez in those pics! Me!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What's got you so riled up about this?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious?! A pic of two people standing next to each other looking like that? It just screams "wedding photo"!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's... certainly not what I was expecting to
hear. Listen, this is my job. The president
appointed me to the role.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I don't intend to give it up.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm not gonna give it up either!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Come on, isn't it obvious that Prez and I look way
better together than the two of you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We've got similar vibes, you know? I bet
everyone wants to see that picture.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Excuse you?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, please. I have an idea. Why don't the
two of you pose for the photos together?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Really? I don't think the message will be as strong
if I'm with Teio...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now hold on a second! What is it about me that
ruins the message?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do you think either of us carry the same weight as
the president?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well... not yet...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dear me. What are we going to do about this?
choice_data_list: Just do your best, you two!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, I suppose it's true that the results
are what matters...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Very well. No matter who is participating, I will
work to ensure the best possible outcome!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh. As reliable as ever, Air Groove. I'm counting
on you too, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You got it! Your mind's gonna be blown when you
see the final product!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And thus, the photo shoot begins...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Um... Do you think you could both make the same
expression?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Teio, more dignity, please. You look like a child.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Puh-lease! You've gotta loosen up, Air Groove! It
feels like you're about to bite my head off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if there's some way of making their
expressions the same. If only there was something
that could make them both smile...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I heard the photoshoot isn't going so well. Can I
help at all?
choice_data_list: Can you give them a wave?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: A... wave? You mean, like this?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Look, it's Prez! Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President?! I didn't know you were coming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The photographer doesn't miss a beat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the school paper goes out a few days later,
everyone loves the picture of the two of them
beaming widely.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I see. Yes, it might be an interesting idea
to have you there as well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The trust between Umamusume and their trainer,
displayed alongside the beauty of the racewear!
What a compelling image!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This may require some alterations to the text of
the article... No matter, I can contact the editor.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Once Prez is onto something, there's no stopping
her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You're not wrong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Symboli Rudolf's misunderstanding, I
end up modeling too.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Okay, here we go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I go to the student council
office to check a sample issue.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it look kinda like a family photo with me
in the middle like that?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are you... N-nonsense...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Although, you may actually have a point...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This might cause unwanted misunderstanding. We
may want to consider a reca—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? Your racewear, your expressions,
your positions... I think they all look great.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the school paper photoshoot ends in
success.
